name: Google Cloud
description: Monitor GCP projects and infrastructure for cloud compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Google Cloud Console > APIs & Services > Credentials
2. Create an OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Web application)
3. Add redirect URI: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
4. Enable Cloud Resource Manager API
5. Copy Client ID and Client Secret

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists GCP projects for cloud infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies GCP has separate projects per environment
